version.description: Semantic content version for this specific grid layout (e.g., 1.0.0).

map_id.description: Stable identifier for the map (e.g., beachdead, alienbasehub, thebloodcount).

schema_version.description: Schema version string used to coordinate compatibility with tools (e.g., map_grid_v1).

grid_size.description: Dimensions of the grid in cells.

cols.description: Number of columns (X axis) in the grid.

rows.description: Number of rows (Z axis) in the grid.

cell_size.description: Size of one grid cell edge in world units (e.g., 4.0 for a 4x4 N64-style grid).

y_level.description: Base world-space Y coordinate for this grid layer (e.g., 0.0).

origin.description: World-space origin used to map grid (col,row) to world XZ coordinates.

x.description: World-space X coordinate corresponding to grid column 0.

z.description: World-space Z coordinate corresponding to grid row 0.

metadata.description: Optional free-form metadata about this grid (author, notes, etc.).

cells.description: Sparse list of defined cells; any missing (col,row) is treated as empty/void.

col.description: Grid column index in the range [0, grid_size.cols).

row.description: Grid row index in the range [0, grid_size.rows).

tile_type.description: Logical tile identifier (e.g., TFloorIndustrialPlain, TWallFence). Resolved via tileset.

walkable.description: Whether this cell is traversable for pathing (defaults to true for floors).

height_offset.description: Per-cell Y offset relative to the grid y_level for ramps, stairs, etc.

rotation_deg.description: Optional rotation in degrees around Y applied when instantiating the tile.

scale.description: Uniform scale factor applied to this tile instance.

role_tags.description: Semantic tags that annotate this cell (e.g., trench, fence1, hubfloor, hedgemaze).
